info.title: Teable App
info.description: Manage Data as easy as drink a cup of tea

x-codeSamples.source:
import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("DELETE", "/api/enterprise/%7BorganizationId%7D/domain-verification?domain=SOME_STRING_VALUE", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/enterprise/%7BorganizationId%7D/domain-verification", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"domain\":\"string\",\"verifyCode\":\"string\"}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/enterprise/%7BorganizationId%7D/domain-verification", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"domain\":\"string\"}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/enterprise/%7BorganizationId%7D/domain-verification/send-verification-email", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))
